settings.editor:
At Atlas Dental Boutique, we've redefined what a dental visit should feel like. Our state-of-the-art practice in Sparks combines cutting-edge technology with a warm, boutique atmosphere that makes every appointment something to look forward to. Led by Dr. Ben Atlas, a Navy Veteran and Board Certified Diplomat, our team brings military precision to patient care while maintaining the genuine compassion that makes our practice feel like home.

 

We believe dentistry should be more than just a necessity—it should be an experience that leaves you feeling valued, comforted, and empowered. From the moment you walk through our doors, you'll discover a practice where excellence meets genuine care, and where your dental health goals become our shared mission. 

 

Just as Atlas carried the world, we proudly carry the responsibility of your trust, leading with strength, integrity, and an unwavering commitment to exceptional results.

icon_list.text: Board Certified Diplomat of the American Board of General Dentistry
Advanced technology in a spa-like, boutique setting
Comprehensive care for patients ages 13 and up
Navy Veteran-led practice with values of honor, courage, and commitment
Community giveback through Feeding Famished Felines partnership

settings.ekit_heading_extra_title: A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the necessary regelialia. It is a paradise

settings.editor: From preventive care to complete smile transformations, Atlas Dental Boutique offers the full spectrum of modern dentistry. Each service is delivered with meticulous attention to detail and a commitment to your comfort.

settings.description_text: Protect your smile with comprehensive preventive care including cleanings, exams, and personalized treatment plans. Our proactive approach helps you maintain optimal oral health long-term.
Restore function and beauty to damaged teeth with advanced restorative treatments. From fillings to crowns, we deliver durable, natural-looking results using the latest materials and techniques.

Transform your smile with cosmetic treatments designed to enhance your confidence. Our aesthetic expertise and artistic approach delivers stunning results that look natural and feel authentically yours.
Get fast relief when dental emergencies strike. Our team provides prompt, compassionate care for urgent situations, helping you get out of pain and back to your life with minimal disruption
Replace missing teeth with the gold standard solution that looks, feels, and functions like natural teeth. Our precise placement techniques restore beauty while preserving bone health.
Achieve the straight, beautiful smile you've always wanted with discreet clear aligner solutions. Comfortable, convenient orthodontic treatment designed to fit seamlessly into your lifestyle.
Save your natural tooth and eliminate pain with expert root canal treatment. Our gentle approach and advanced techniques make endodontic therapy comfortable while preserving your tooth structure.

Protect your teeth and overall health with comprehensive gum disease treatment. Our proven techniques restore gum health, halt disease progression, and prevent tooth loss through expert, compassionate care.

settings.ekit_heading_extra_title: A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the necessary regelialia. It is a paradise

settings.description_text: Dr. Atlas is a Board Certified Diplomate with the American Board of General Dentistry and has also achieved Fellowship with the Academy of General Dentistry - an achievement only 6% of dentists reach, ensuring you receive expert care backed by advanced training.

settings.editor: With 7 years of Navy service including deployment aboard the USS Abraham Lincoln, Dr. Atlas brings exceptional attention to detail and unwavering commitment to every patient.

settings.description_text: We invest in the latest dental innovations to deliver more accurate diagnoses, comfortable treatments, and superior results that last. Advanced care should be standard, not optional.
Our spa-like environment transforms dental visits into relaxing experiences. From the moment you arrive, you'll feel the difference that thoughtful design, including our comfort menu, makes.
Our Feeding Famished Felines Partnership with the Nevada Humane Society helps support Sparks and Reno with a donation made for every new patient.
We believe in clear communication and honest treatment recommendations. You'll always understand your options, costs, and what to expect—no surprises, just straightforward care.

settings.editor:
Doctor of Dental Surgery | Board Certified Diplomat

Board Certified Diplomat and Fellow of the Academy of General Dentistry, Dr. Atlas brings military precision and heartfelt compassion to every patient interaction. A Navy Veteran with extensive training and a commitment to lifelong learning, he's dedicated to serving Sparks and Reno with honor.

settings.editor: Dedicated to providing expert dental care with advanced technology, experienced professionals, and personalized treatments to ensure your well-being and a healthier future.

ekit_testimonial_data.review: From the moment I walked in, I knew this wasn't a typical dental office. The atmosphere is so calming and welcoming, and Dr. Atlas took time to really listen to my concerns. I finally found a dentist I trust completely and actually look forward to seeing.

Dr. Atlas's attention to detail is incredible. He explained everything thoroughly and made sure I was comfortable every step of the way. The boutique setting makes such a difference—it feels more like a spa than a dental office. Highly recommend!

As someone with significant dental anxiety, finding Dr. Atlas has been life-changing. The sedation options and his gentle approach helped me finally get the dental care I'd been avoiding for years. The results are amazing and the experience was actually pleasant.
